S.FORM: John Battle sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1962, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 11, John Battle, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *ońßn ő≤attle s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a, wal malaxmis~…ēuq qanij la. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj * nqu taj **, *ońßn ő≤attle, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
